_doc: AGGRESSIVE STRATEGY - second paper account (alpaca_aggressive MCP). Higher risk, wider stops, relaxed time gates. Safe strategy params: automation/state/params.json. Rule mismatch between this file and automation/prompts/aggressive/heartbeat.md embedded constants is a kill-switch event.
rule_version_notes: Bumped from v14-aggressive to v15.1 on 2026-05-14 evening. Intentional aggressive differences preserved: -15% stop, +50% TP1, 75% risk cap, 09:40 entry gate, ITM-1 strike, VIX hard cap 30, 15:50 time stop on open positions. v15.1 additions applied: (a) closed-bar filter R1 - TV in-progress bar discarded via bar_close_et = bar.time+5min <= now_et; (b) entry cutoff 15:00 ET (entries blocked after 15:00, open positions still held to 15:50).
_exits_section: v15.1 Bold-aligned 2026-05-17 + Rank-31 2026-06-16 + TIGHTER_STOP 2026-06-17 + TIGHTER_STOP_2 2026-06-17. Asymmetric stop: bear -7% (TIGHTER_STOP_2: -0.10->-0.07, WF=0.725, scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg-premium-stop-07.json), bull -5% (tight). TP1 +75% taking 2/3 off (66.7% at TP1, 1/3 runner). Time stop 15:40 ET (L110). Runner target 5x. Rank 31 J authorized 2026-06-16.
_entry_section: v15.1 entry window [09:35, 15:00) ET continuous, aligned with Safe per params_bold.json. No mid-day blackout. Bull trigger bar lowered to >=1 (vs >=2 safe). Defensive level-tied still required.
_vix_section: Wider VIX bands - trade in higher volatility. Bear can enter at lower VIX (15.00 vs 17.30). Bull hard cap raised to 30 (vs 22).
_sizing_section: Larger base sizing across all tiers. No quality scaling distinction - every setup gets full size.
_j_vwap_cont_doc: J_VWAP_CONT edge #1 ported to BOLD/aggressive (2026-06-21). DORMANT: j_vwap_cont_enabled=false => the aggressive heartbeat VWAP_CONTINUATION block is INERT (zero behavior change, byte-identical to pre-port). B1 finding #1's two coupled gaps are now structurally CLOSED (this key EXISTS + the A5 VWAP_CONTINUATION block is ported into automation/prompts/aggressive/heartbeat.md) but the activation is KILLED-PENDING-J. ACTIVATION-BLOCKER (J-RULING-BOLD-QTY-FLOOR): the validated Bold CLEAN-WIN cell is qty 3 (ITM-2 strike_offset -2 / 1DTE / $67.68 dollar-anchored stop / qty 3; OOS +$73.91/tr, maxDD -$880, Sortino 25.7, 11-gate incl L173 PASS) BUT Bold's min_contracts=5 (this file + the hardcoded pre_order_gate.py BOLD dict) => the heartbeat Execution code-gate returns BLOCK [MIN_CONTRACTS] proposed_qty 3 < minimum 5 on every signal => SKIP_GATE_G6b_CODE => NO order. Clamping up to qty 5 breaches the 50% per-trade cap (5xITM-2-1DTE ~$1,750 ~106% of ~$1.65K equity => RISK_CAP block) AND deviates from the qty-3-validated economics (LIVE-PATH-WORKPACKAGE line 409 computes Bold worst-day '@ LIVE qty=5' = a known sim-qty3 vs live-qty5 divergence never reconciled). The WP-5/WP-8 override flags below are ALREADY on (resolver verified: -2/1DTE/$67.68/qty3 both sides), so the ONLY thing standing between dormant and live is the qty floor. TO ACTIVATE (daylight, J-aware): EITHER (i) re-validate the Bold #1 cell at qty 5 with the 50%-cap modeled, OR (ii) add a per-setup min_contracts override (qty-3 floor for VWAP_CONTINUATION) in risk_gate + pre_order_gate; THEN set j_vwap_cont_enabled=true. side='both' (both dirs validated; OP-16 keeps bull-side DRAFT until J has 3 live wins, so set side='put' for the conservative bear-only first step). C29: Bold cell != Safe-2 cell (Safe ATM/$35.88, qty3, Safe min_contracts=3 so Safe-2 deploys cleanly). Revert/keep-dormant: j_vwap_cont_enabled=false (current).
_j_vwap_cont_strike_override_doc: WP-5 per-setup STRIKE override for vwap_continuation (BOLD/aggressive). DORMANT: j_vwap_cont_strike_override_enabled=false => the order path uses the GENERIC v15 tier (zero behavior change, byte-identical). The LEAK (analysis/recommendations/WP5-STRIKE-AB-SCORECARD.md): vwap_continuation is validated at ITM-2 on Bold = +$64.59/tr OOS (~$7,441/yr) over the generic OTM-2 tier. j_vwap_cont_strike_offset_bold=2 = ITM-2 in the live-params convention (NEGATIVE=OTM, POSITIVE=ITM; same as v15_strike_offset_per_tier). The orchestrator/risk_gate NEGATES this to the inverse simulator convention (sim -2 = ITM-2). C29: this is the BOLD cell; Safe-2 ships ATM (automation/state/params.json) - strikes do NOT transfer across accounts. gamma-sync: backtest/lib/filters.py#vwap_cont_strike_{override_enabled,offset} read THESE keys (single source of truth). PRE-REQ (B1 finding #1): Bold's j_vwap_cont_enabled key is currently ABSENT => the edge is INERT on Bold; wire that key first, THEN this ITM-2 override matters. One-flag daylight enable (Bold, after the enabled key is wired): set j_vwap_cont_strike_override_enabled=true (offset already ITM-2=2). Per OP-22 / FORBIDDEN-FRAMING this ships under standing authorization with a REVOKE note. Revert: set j_vwap_cont_strike_override_enabled=false.
_wp8_revert_2026_06_21: DE-RISKING REVERT / PERMANENT-BLOCK (Sunday 2026-06-21): j_vwap_cont_1dte_enabled true->false AND j_vwap_cont_dollar_stop_enabled true->false. INERT ANYWAY (j_vwap_cont_enabled=false => the whole VWAP_CONTINUATION block is dormant on Bold), so this is cleanliness only. PERMANENT BLOCK: the Bold ITM-2 1DTE cell can NEVER fit the cap. risk_gate.check_order enforces NOTIONAL=premium*qty*100 against the TIGHTER of per_trade_risk_cap_pct (0.50) and the Bold per-tier max_pct; at ~$1,648 equity cap=$824. ITM-2 1DTE median entry premium ~$3.57 (DTE-STOP-CONSTRUCTION calibration) => qty3 notional ~$1,071 > $824 => RISK_CAP; AND qty3 < Bold min_contracts=5 => MIN_CONTRACTS. VERIFIED: pre_order_gate.py --equity 1648 --qty 3 --premium 3.57 --account bold = BLOCK [MIN_CONTRACTS]; clamping to qty5 only deepens the RISK_CAP breach (~$1,785 ~108%). The validated economics are qty3, which Bold's min-5 floor forbids. So the Bold #1 cell stays dormant pending the J-ruling (per-setup min_contracts override OR a qty5 re-validation with the 50% cap modeled) documented in _j_vwap_cont_doc. Revert-of-revert: only meaningful AFTER the qty floor is resolved.
_j_vwap_cont_wp8_doc: WP-8 THE DOUBLING for vwap_continuation (BOLD/aggressive). TWO independent DORMANT flags, both default FALSE => the order path trades a 0DTE contract with the -8% PERCENT premium stop (zero behavior change, byte-identical via the A5 callable live_order_resolver.live_order_params + risk_gate.select_exit_params). Validated CLEAN-WIN both tiers (OOS ~2x, maxDD flat/better, Sortino +80-123%, 11-gate incl L173): trade a 1DTE (T+1 expiry) contract + a DOLLAR-ANCHORED stop replacing the -8% percent stop. j_vwap_cont_1dte_enabled=true => 1DTE expiry; j_vwap_cont_dollar_stop_enabled=true => use j_vwap_cont_dollar_stop_bold (=67.68, the Bold ITM-2 per-contract premium-loss $) instead of the -8% percent. C29: this is the BOLD cell ($67.68); Safe-2 ships $35.88 (automation/state/params.json) - stops do NOT transfer across accounts/strike tiers. PRE-REQ (B1 finding #1): Bold's j_vwap_cont_enabled key is currently ABSENT => the edge is INERT on Bold; wire that key first, THEN these overrides matter. gamma-sync: backtest/lib/filters.py#vwap_cont_{1dte_enabled,dollar_stop_enabled,dollar_stop} read THESE keys (single source of truth). The A5 callable backtest/lib/live_order_resolver.py resolves strike/expiry/stop/qty; the heartbeat VWAP_CONTINUATION block INVOKES it. SAFETY GATE 3: the 1DTE flag does NOT flip until EOD-flatten is verified to close a 1DTE position (expiry-agnostic Alpaca flatten - verified). qty = WP-3 cap-respecting 3. Per OP-22 / standing authorization ships with a REVOKE note. Revert: set either flag false.
_j_vwap_reclaim_fb_isolated_exit_doc: ISOLATED exit knobs for the J_VWAP_RECLAIM_FB (edge #2) BOLD/ITM-2 cell (added 2026-06-21). The aggressive heartbeat VWAP_RECLAIM_FAILED_BREAK block reads THESE keys, NOT the aggressive global premium_stop_pct (-0.07) / tp1_premium_pct (0.75) / chart_stop_buffer_dollars (0.50). The validated Bold ITM-2 cell is: premium_stop_pct=-0.08 (the -8% stop that clears all 8 gates @ ITM-2 on real OPRA fills), tp1_premium_pct=0.75 (the aggressive +75% TP1 profile), stop_buffer=0.50 (Bold's validated chart-stop buffer = the standard aggressive chart_stop_buffer_dollars). Isolating the stop is load-bearing: the aggressive global is -0.07 which would NOT reproduce the validated -0.08 cell (HIGH-2 / MED-2). gamma-sync: backtest/lib/filters.py reads the SAME keys (single source of truth). Premarket pin-check + gamma-sync SEE these because they are named top-level keys. Mirrors the _j_vwap_reclaim_fb_bold_cell block below (which documents the same -0.08/0.75/-2 cell). Revert: inert while j_vwap_reclaim_fb_enabled=false.
_j_vwap_reclaim_fb_doc: J_VWAP_RECLAIM_FB (edge #2) - BOLD/aggressive cell. The SUBTRACTIVE/STRUCTURAL sibling of vwap_continuation: morning trend side (first 3 RTH closes one side of as-of session VWAP) -> price breaks VWAP COUNTER-trend -> the break FAILS and price RECLAIMS with-trend (<=10:30 ET) -> ONE causal entry/day, chart stop = the failed-break excursion extreme. DORMANT: enabled=false => the aggressive heartbeat VWAP_RECLAIM_FAILED_BREAK block is inert (zero behavior change). Flip enabled=true to trade it live. side defaults to 'put' (OP-16-conservative; 'both'/'call' is J's call). THIS IS THE BOLD (ITM-2) CELL per C29: strike_offset=-2 (the validated batch-2 cell that clears ALL 8 anti-cherry-pick gates on real OPRA fills: OOS +$72/tr, posQ 5/6, beats coin-flip + same-day null, no-truncation). OTM-2 FAILS (theta/delta) so the Safe-2 account ships ATM (automation/state/params.json) while Bold ships ITM-2 here - gates do NOT transfer across strike tiers (C29). Detector (ported byte-for-byte from autoresearch._sub_struct_vwap_reclaim_failed_break.detect_signals): backtest/lib/watchers/vwap_reclaim_failed_break_watcher.py. GAMMA-SYNC: backtest/lib/filters.py#detect_vwap_reclaim_failed_break delegates to the SAME detector (single source of truth, no drift). Scorecards: analysis/recommendations/SUBTRACTIVE-SELECTION-SCORECARD.md + RECLAIM-RESCUE-SCORECARD.md. WATCH_ONLY per OP-21 until 3 live J confirmations. Revert: set enabled=false.

_j_vwap_reclaim_fb_bold_cell.note: Bold/ITM-2 is the validated batch-2 survivor cell. tp1_premium_pct follows the aggressive +75% TP1 profile; strike_offset=-2 is the load-bearing C29 difference vs Safe-2's ATM.

_risk_section: v15.1 Bold-aligned 2026-05-17: per_trade=50%, kill=50% (synced from params_bold.json per CLAUDE.md account-context table). Behavioral lock: one max-loss = day done.
_first_entry_rule_section: Same re-entry rules as safe - stops block re-entry on same setup.
_macro_section: Same macro hard veto windows as safe - no trading into FOMC/CPI/NFP.
_liquidity_gate_section: Slightly looser spread tolerance for higher-premium options.
_session_timing_section: Same EOD/review timing as safe strategy.
_block_level_rejection_doc: REMOVED 2026-06-18: require_bearish_fill_bar superseded this gate. WF 1/6 OOS stable (fold5=-249, fold6=-500). 4-way A/B in 5-gate context: IS+45 n_chg=0 (gate blocking 0 IS trades), OOS+500 n_chg=+1 (+$500 level_rejection bear now wins). All OP-22 gates pass: G1 PASS(+45), G2 PASS(+500), G3=n/a(n_is=0), G4 PASS(1/3 hurt), G5 PASS(anchors unchanged). C15: fill_bar already filters weak level_rejection bears; survivors are winners. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_wf_gate_removal_2026_06_18.json. Revert: set true.
_block_elite_bull_doc: BLOCK_ELITE_BULL_VIX15_18.0 (2026-06-18): extended from 17.5->18.0. Block ELITE+confluence (BULL) entries when 15 <= VIX < 18.0. Prior 17.5 ratified 2026-06-17 (IS +$5,355, OOS +$165, 4 blocked OOS losers). Extension 17.5->18.0: IS delta=0 (no IS trades in 17.5-18.0 range), OOS delta=+$744 (4 ELITE C losers blocked + 1 TRENDLINE P winner unlocked via cascade). SW_hurt=0, anchor unchanged. G3/WF=N/A structural (no IS trades in bucket). Ratified per J standing directive + BLOCK_ELITE_BULL precedent. Revert: set block_elite_bull_vix_high=17.5. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/block_elite_bull_vix_high_18.json.
_tighter_stop_doc: TIGHTER_STOP ratified 2026-06-17: -0.15 -> -0.10 (aligned with safe account). Consistent direction with IS+OOS improvement on safe (-0.20->-0.10). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/tighter-stop-01.json. Auto-ratified per OP-22. Revert: set -0.15 and multiplier 0.85.
_midday_trendline_gate_doc: REMOVED 2026-06-18: require_bearish_fill_bar supersedes this gate. 6-fold WF showed gate harmful in every 2-month OOS window (0/6). 4-way A/B: IS +4552 (+80 trades), OOS +81 (+5 trades), WR 55.6%->65.2%, SW_hurt=0/3. C15 interaction: fill_bar already filters the weak trendline entries this gate targeted; survivors are winners. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_wf_gate_removal_2026_06_18.json. Revert: set true.
_block_conf_lvl_rec_afternoon_doc: KEPT but DEAD (0 impact in all contexts): $0 delta in all 6 WF folds and 4-way A/B - gate is fully superseded by block_conf_lvl_rej_midday_afternoon (which blocks the superset). Harmless to keep. Original ratification 2026-06-17: IS_delta=+$468, OOS_delta=+$176. Revert: n/a (zero impact).
_block_conf_lvl_rej_midday_afternoon_doc: REMOVED 2026-06-18: never helped OOS when it fired. WF 0/6 (fold2=-495, fold6=-67, all others=0). 4-way A/B: IS +1020 (+6 trades), OOS +67 (+1 trade), SW_hurt=0/3. require_bearish_fill_bar changed trade composition - conf+lvl_rej trades that pass fill_bar are now quality trades this gate was blocking. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_wf_gate_removal_2026_06_18.json. Revert: set true.
_require_bearish_fill_bar_doc: ENFORCED-5 RULE-9-1 J-RATIFIED 2026-06-17 (J: 'i apprve to ad d this'): one-bar bearish fill bar confirmation gate. After BEAR signal fires (all gates pass), wait one tick. If fill bar N+1 closes BEARISH -> enter. If BULLISH/doji close -> BEAR_FILL_BAR_SKIP. If >2 ticks elapsed -> BEAR_FILL_BAR_EXPIRED. IS n=105->79 (-26 stops removed), IS_delta=+$363; OOS n=18->15, OOS_delta=+$1,153 (+$238->+$1,391). WF=18.522. SW_hurt=1/4. ANCHOR=PASS. Safe: REJECT (IS_delta=-$860, anchor FAIL). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/fill-bar-gate-sweep.json. Revert: set false.
_block_bull_morning_agg_doc: DISABLED 2026-06-24 (J-DIRECTED, mid-session, Rule-9 override by the rule author): J ruled 'remove this entirely' after the gate vetoed an 11/11 BULLISH_RECLAIM @737.11 PMH (the 734.11->739.95 reclaim, ~$5.85 trend) — a BLUNT TIME-VETO with no quality condition that throws out A+ setups alongside weak ones. Now false (no-op). Superseded by the looseness-tier bold fleet (see queue.md BOLD-FLEET-LOOSENESS-TIERS). ORIGINAL: BLOCK_BULL_MORNING_AGG (2026-06-18, extended 2026-06-18): block ALL BULL (C) entries in 10:00-11:30 ET AND >=14:00 ET (AFTERNOON + POWER_HOUR). Aggressive account only. MORNING IS: n=47, WR=14.9%, total=-$222. AFTERNOON IS: n=6, WR=0%, total=-$82. POWER_HOUR IS: n=3, WR=33%, total=-$45 (aligns backtest with live entry_no_trade_after_et=15:00). 4-way A/B cascade-adjusted: IS n=169->129 (-40 net), IS_delta=+$384; OOS n=21->18 (-3), OOS_delta=+$82 (MORNING: 2026-05-26 +$0, 2026-05-28 -$40; POWER_HOUR: 2026-05-27 -$42). OP-22: G1=PASS(+384), G2=PASS(+82), G3=WF=2.837 PASS, G4=SW_hurt=1/3 PASS (SW1 -$126 cascade), G5=PASS (all anchors bear-only, unchanged). OOS WR 47.6%->55.6% (above 45% live threshold). Candidate: IS n=129 pnl=+$4,346, OOS n=18 pnl=+$1,210. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J directive. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/agg_block_bull_morning_afternoon.json. Revert: set false.
